# Level 6 — The Gauntlet Bridge
# New mechanic: combines everything learned so far simultaneously.
# Spikes directly under platforms — missing the platform = spike death.
# Enemies on platforms force combat while balancing on 3-tile surfaces.
# One section has a 6-tile gap (near-max horizontal jump, requires full run speed).
# Mid-level there's a descending section then a climb — tests full moveset.
# Vow Stone is guarded: enemy stands directly next to it on a 3-tile platform.
# Width: 42 cols | Height: 22 rows
